productDisplayName: Puma Women Ferrari LS Shopper Black Handbags
description: The ferrari LS Shopper is not to be left behind for short trips, road trips, nor anything in between. It celebrates puma and Ferrari&rsquo s successful partnership with branded elements and distinctly smooth aesthetics. The sporty silhouette is decked out with lux Italian material and emblems, including a Ferrari shield and Italian flag label. The large main compartment features zip, slip, and mobile phone pockets. Finishing touches include a handle design with a belt buckle, brushed silver hardware, and special motorsport designed zip pullers. Length: 34 cm Made of high end polymer with two chambers One main chamber with a zip, slip, and mobile phone pockets Sub chamber on the front with a velcro fastener Handle design with a belt buckle Stitch detailing for enhanced durability Brushed silver hardware, and special motorsport designed zip pullers Ferrari shield and Italian flag label puma Leaping cat logo in metal appliqué d on the front Ferrari Original Logo embroidery on the front pocket Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
